description: Expected CodeRifts analysis output for the agent-api-demo breaking changes. This shows the Agent Impact section that would appear in a PR comment.

breaking_changes.change: OAuth scope 'refunds:process' removed from global security

agent_impact.impact: Agent loses refunds:process capability — tool calls requiring refunds:process will fail silently
Agents hardcoding `/webhooks` will call a dead endpoint

breaking_changes.change: Response field 'receipt_url' removed from Payment schema

agent_impact.impact: Agents reading `receipt_url` will receive `undefined` — no runtime warning

breaking_changes.change: Enum value 'refunded' removed from status parameter

agent_impact.impact: Strict agents with switch-case validation may break on removed value `refunded`

breaking_changes.change: Required field 'idempotency_key' added to POST /payments request body

agent_impact.impact: Agents not sending `idempotency_key` will receive 422 errors immediately

affected_tools.reason: Enum value 'refunded' removed from status filter
New required field 'idempotency_key' — tool input schema outdated
Endpoint removed — tool calls will fail with 404
